title: True End-to-End JSON-to-CLOSED_CLEANLY Orchestrator v1
summary: Adds Phase168 proof files and a generic production-safe orchestrator for the full command JSON to CLOSED_CLEANLY path, including exact ZIP queueing, QA Guarantee, safe merge approval after PASS_GUARANTEED, closeout wait, and clipboard handoff capture.

changes.purpose: Reusable safe orchestrator for command JSON to CLOSED_CLEANLY flow.
Verifier for Phase168 files, markers, and request artifacts.

hardStops: Exact ZIP name and SHA may be checked before queueing.
The orchestrator only moves an exact expected ZIP into 01_apply_approved.
Merge approval is only moved after PASS_GUARANTEED.
Closeout wait ignores PASS and PASS_GUARANTEED while waiting for CLOSED_CLEANLY.
This overlay does not add credentials, tokens, paid services, dependency installs, security-setting changes, or startup persistence.
